lesson.claim: Project Telos has a stricter proof-carrying research loop draft that binds source intake, local probes, verifier verdicts, learning receipts, website copy, and official-paper revision boundaries.
lesson.scope: Eighth-wave planning and tooling receipt package only; not an arXiv, Zenodo, OSF, SSRN, journal, theorem, natural-law, or frontier-discovery claim.

scaffold.prompt: Restate, in your own words, exactly what this claim asserts and nothing more: "Project Telos has a stricter proof-carrying research loop draft that binds source intake, local probes, verifier verdicts, learning receipts, website copy, and official-paper revision boundaries." (scope: Eighth-wave planning and tooling receipt package only; not an arXiv, Zenodo, OSF, SSRN, journal, theorem, natural-law, or frontier-discovery claim.).

Judging by their refs alone (docs/research/whitepapers/PROOF-CARRYING-RESEARCH-LOOPS-2026-07-02.md, docs/outreach/EIGHTH-WAVE-LOCAL-REPRODUCTION-AND-PUBLISHING-PIPELINE-2026-07-02.md, docs/outreach/receipts/eighth-wave/pandas-63458-repro/local-reproduction-receipt.json, docs/outreach/receipts/eighth-wave-tooling-run-2026-07-02.json), predict what each recorded source could contribute as evidence for or against the claim.
The packet's overall verdict is UNVERIFIABLE. Before reading anything else, derive what a UNVERIFIABLE verdict must mean about the relationship between the claim and the recorded checks.
List the checks you would run to reach your own verdict on this claim, then compare your list against what the packet's verdict implies was actually checked.

retrievalQuestions.question: What evidence would falsify this claim: "Project Telos has a stricter proof-carrying research loop draft that binds source intake, local probes, verifier verdicts, learning receipts, website copy, and official-paper revision boundaries."?
Which recorded source would you re-check first, and what does its content hash let you prove about it?
What does an overall verdict of UNVERIFIABLE entitle you to claim, and what does it not?

The packet's scope is "Eighth-wave planning and tooling receipt package only; not an arXiv, Zenodo, OSF, SSRN, journal, theorem, natural-law, or frontier-discovery claim.". Give one claim that would exceed that scope.

lesson.boundary: Lesson scaffold only -- prompts for the operator to derive the reasoning; never an answer dump, never a graded-assessment answer.

misconception.prompt: The 4 recorded source(s) could not establish the claim "Project Telos has a stricter proof-carrying research loop draft that binds source intake, local probes, verifier verdicts, learning receipts, website copy, and official-paper revision boundaries." as scoped. Explain why the claim reaches beyond what that evidence can establish, and what narrower claim the same evidence would support.
